roa.docketEntryComment: /TEXT/TRIAL PHASE PRESENTATION OF PROSECUTION EXHIBITS-WITNESSES//X:ALL PRESENT AS HERETOFORE AND JURY TRIAL RESUMES,//WIT SWORN DA:OFFICER JUSTIN ERB, SFPD/EXHM:4-POLAROID PHOTO(6 BULLETS ANDBLACK GLOVE)/WIT SWORN DA:OFFICER GARLA MCBRIDE, SFPD//X:11:05 AM, PEOPLE REST,  STIPULATION OCCURED THAT THE GUN WAS PROCESS BY THE CRIME SCENE INVESTIGATOR AND NO LATENT PRINTS IN THE GUN,/X:EXHIBITS 1,2,3 & 4 ARE ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE,/X:11:13 AM,  COURT ORDERED RECESS FOR10 MINUTES,/X:OUT OF THE PRESENCE OF THE JURY,  DEFENSE MOTION PURSUANT TO1118,1PC, ARGUED AND DENIED,/X:AT 11:43 AM,  ALL PRESENT IN OPEN COURT,JUDGE PARTIALLY INSTRUCT THE JURY AS TO APPLICABLE LAWS,/X:12 NOON-RECESSTO 1:15 PM,  JURY ADMONISHED,/X:1:25 PM, JURY TRIAL RESUMES WITH BOTH COUNSEL PROCEEDED WITH THEIR CLOSING ARGUMENTS FOLLOWED BY REBUTTAL BY THE PEOPLE,/X:FINAL INSTRUCTIONS BY THE COURT TO THE JURY, BAILIFF SWORN AND THE JURY RETIRES FOR DELIBERATION,/X:AT 3:30 PM,  JURY REACHES A VERDICT AS NOTGUILTY ON BOTH COUNTS,/X:VERDICT IS RECORDED AND THE EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN AND GIVEN TO THE DA,/
